name: TikTok Ads
description: Manage TikTok Ads through Pipeboard's hosted MCP server. 60 tools spanning advertiser accounts, campaigns, ad groups, ads, Smart+ (AI-driven) campaigns, TikTok Shop GMV Max, creatives, identities, pixels, product catalogs, custom audiences, targeting and performance reporting. WORKFLOW: (1) call list_tiktok_advertisers first to get your advertiser_id. (2) Use get_tiktok_campaigns, get_tiktok_adgroups and get_tiktok_ads to inspect structure. (3) Use get_tiktok_insights or get_tiktok_integrated_report for reporting. WARNING: create_*, update_* and delete_* tools act on LIVE TikTok ad accounts. They publish real ads and spend real budget. Always confirm with the user before creating or activating anything. Pipeboard is an independent third-party service; your TikTok OAuth connection and ad data are processed on Pipeboard's servers.

tools.name: list_tiktok_advertisers
tools.description: List all authorized TikTok advertiser accounts (returns advertiser IDs from the OAuth connection). Start here.

tools.name: get_tiktok_advertiser_info
tools.description: Detailed info about a TikTok advertiser account (name, currency, timezone, status, balance).

tools.name: get_tiktok_campaigns
tools.description: List auction campaigns for an advertiser (ID, name, type, objective, budget, status).

tools.name: create_tiktok_campaign
tools.description: Create a new TikTok Ads campaign with an objective. Writes to a live advertiser account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_campaign
tools.description: Update a campaign's settings (name, budget, ...). Writes to a live advertiser account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_campaign_status
tools.description: Enable, disable or delete one or more campaigns.

tools.name: get_tiktok_adgroups
tools.description: List ad groups for an advertiser (targeting, budget, schedule, status).

tools.name: create_tiktok_adgroup
tools.description: Create a new ad group (TikTok equivalent of an Ad Set): targeting, budget, bid, schedule. Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_adgroup
tools.description: Update an ad group (name, budget, bid, targeting, schedule, pacing). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_adgroup_status
tools.description: Enable, disable or delete one or more ad groups.

tools.name: get_tiktok_ads
tools.description: List ads for an advertiser (format, text, CTA, landing page, creative IDs, status).

tools.name: create_tiktok_ad
tools.description: Create a new ad in an ad group. Call get_tiktok_identities first. Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_ad
tools.description: Update an ad (name, text, landing page, creative assets, CTA). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_ad_status
tools.description: Enable, disable or delete one or more ads.

tools.name: get_tiktok_insights
tools.description: Performance insights (spend, impressions, clicks, CTR, CPC, conversions) with breakdowns by campaign, ad group or ad.

tools.name: get_tiktok_integrated_report
tools.description: Run a synchronous report via the TikTok Reporting API (aggregated metrics at a given data level).

tools.name: create_tiktok_report_task
tools.description: Create an asynchronous report task; poll its status with check_tiktok_report_task.

tools.name: check_tiktok_report_task
tools.description: Check the status of an async report task and get the download URL.

tools.name: cancel_tiktok_report_task
tools.description: Cancel an async report task that is still in progress.

tools.name: get_tiktok_targeting_regions
tools.description: Get available targeting regions and location IDs (required when creating ad groups).

tools.name: get_tiktok_interest_categories
tools.description: Get available interest-category IDs for ad-group targeting.

tools.name: upload_tiktok_image
tools.description: Upload an image by URL for use in ad creatives; returns an image_id.

tools.name: upload_tiktok_video
tools.description: Upload a video by URL for use in ad creatives; returns video_id and material_id.

tools.name: get_tiktok_video_info
tools.description: Get info on videos in the asset library; canonical polling target after upload_tiktok_video.

tools.name: list_tiktok_pixels
tools.description: List TikTok Pixels for an advertiser (pixel_id and pixel_code).

tools.name: get_tiktok_pixel_event_stats
tools.description: Get pixel-side event counts; use when get_tiktok_insights rejects a conversion metric.

tools.name: get_tiktok_identities
tools.description: List available identities for an advertiser; required before create_tiktok_ad.

tools.name: create_tiktok_identity
tools.description: DEPRECATED: TikTok no longer supports custom identities for ad creation as of 2026.

tools.name: get_tiktok_identity_videos
tools.description: List TikTok posts (videos) owned by an identity; required for Spark Ads creation.

tools.name: create_tiktok_catalog
tools.description: Create a product catalog for TikTok Shopping / Dynamic Product Ads (requires a Business Center ID).

tools.name: get_tiktok_catalogs
tools.description: List all catalogs or get a specific catalog for a Business Center.

tools.name: update_tiktok_catalog
tools.description: Update the name of an existing catalog.

tools.name: get_tiktok_catalog_overview
tools.description: Get the product audit-status overview (approved, disapproved, pending counts).

tools.name: get_tiktok_catalog_feeds
tools.description: List feeds for a catalog, or get a specific feed.

tools.name: upload_tiktok_catalog_products
tools.description: Upload products to a catalog via a public CSV or XML file URL.

tools.name: delete_tiktok_catalog_products
tools.description: Delete products from a catalog in bulk.

tools.name: get_tiktok_gmv_max_campaign_info
tools.description: Fetch details for a single TikTok Shop GMV Max campaign (auto-optimized Shop campaign).

tools.name: get_tiktok_gmv_max_insights
tools.description: Get performance metrics for TikTok Shop GMV Max campaigns.

tools.name: create_tiktok_smart_plus_campaign
tools.description: Create an Upgraded Smart+ campaign (TikTok's AI-driven campaign type). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: get_tiktok_smart_plus_campaigns
tools.description: List Smart+ campaigns for an advertiser.

tools.name: update_tiktok_smart_plus_campaign
tools.description: Update a Smart+ campaign (name, budget, PO number). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_smart_plus_campaign_status
tools.description: Enable, disable or delete one or more Smart+ campaigns.

tools.name: create_tiktok_smart_plus_adgroup
tools.description: Create a Smart+ ad group under a Smart+ campaign. Writes to a live account.

tools.name: get_tiktok_smart_plus_adgroups
tools.description: List Smart+ ad groups for an advertiser.

tools.name: update_tiktok_smart_plus_adgroup
tools.description: Update a Smart+ ad group. Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_smart_plus_adgroup_status
tools.description: Enable, disable or delete Smart+ ad groups in bulk.

tools.name: create_tiktok_smart_plus_ad
tools.description: Create a Smart+ ad (asset group, up to 50 creatives). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: get_tiktok_smart_plus_ads
tools.description: List Smart+ ads (asset groups) for an advertiser.

tools.name: update_tiktok_smart_plus_ad
tools.description: Update a Smart+ ad (asset group). Writes to a live account.

tools.name: update_tiktok_smart_plus_ad_status
tools.description: Enable, disable or delete Smart+ ads in bulk.

tools.name: update_tiktok_smart_plus_ad_material_status
tools.description: Pause or enable a single creative inside a Smart+ asset group.

tools.name: appeal_tiktok_smart_plus_ad
tools.description: Appeal a Smart+ ad review or rejection.

tools.name: list_tiktok_custom_audiences
tools.description: List all custom audiences for an advertiser (rule-based, file-based, lookalike).

tools.name: create_tiktok_custom_audience
tools.description: Create a rule-based custom audience from pixel or event data.

tools.name: create_tiktok_lookalike_audience
tools.description: Create a lookalike audience from a seed custom audience.

tools.name: update_tiktok_custom_audience
tools.description: Rename an existing custom audience (only the name can be changed).

tools.name: delete_tiktok_custom_audiences
tools.description: Delete one or more custom audiences (irreversible).

tools.name: share_tiktok_custom_audience
tools.description: Share custom audiences with other advertisers in the same Business Center.

tools.name: upload_tiktok_customer_file_audience
tools.description: Create a CUSTOMER_FILE custom audience from a pre-hashed customer list.

tools.name: submit_feedback
tools.description: Report a bug, request a feature or ask a question about the TikTok Ads MCP tools.

bridge.auth_hint: Personal API token from pipeboard.co/api-tokens. Create a free Pipeboard account, connect your TikTok Ads account via OAuth, then generate a token. The same Pipeboard token works across all connected ad platforms.

credentials_required.label: Pipeboard API Token
credentials_required.hint: Personal API token from pipeboard.co/api-tokens. Create a free Pipeboard account and connect your TikTok Ads account via OAuth first.

author: freddy-schuetz
